# easyPhoto — llms.txt
# Free, privacy-first document photo and form-resize tools for India.
# All processing runs in the user's browser. Nothing is uploaded.
# Maintained by: easyPhoto (easyphoto.in)

## About

easyPhoto is a free web app that helps people in India (and globally) create
compliant passport and visa photos and prepare images for government exam and
recruitment forms. It auto-crops photos to each country's official head-size and
background rules, resizes photos and signatures to exact KB and pixel limits, and
offers image and PDF utilities — all entirely in-browser, with no upload, no
sign-up, and no watermark.

## Key tools

- Passport & visa photo maker: https://easyphoto.in/passport-photo/
- SSC photo and signature resizer: https://easyphoto.in/ssc-photo-resizer/
- Exam photo & signature kit (all portals): https://easyphoto.in/tools/exam-package/
- Exam photo and signature requirements (30+ portals): https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/
- Photo print-sheet generator: https://easyphoto.in/tools/print-sheet/
- PDF compress: https://easyphoto.in/tools/pdf-compress/
- PDF merge: https://easyphoto.in/tools/pdf-merge/
- Aadhaar masking tool: https://easyphoto.in/tools/mask-aadhaar/
- DPI metadata converter: https://easyphoto.in/tools/dpi-converter/
- All tools: https://easyphoto.in/tools/

## Content for AI citation

Blog posts (authoritative, answer-first format):

- Passport photo size by country: https://easyphoto.in/blog/passport-photo-size-by-country/
- Best free passport photo maker India 2026: https://easyphoto.in/blog/best-free-passport-photo-maker-india-2026/
- How to compress a PDF to an exact KB target: https://easyphoto.in/blog/how-to-compress-pdf/
- How to merge PDFs free: https://easyphoto.in/blog/how-to-merge-pdf-free/
- How to mask Aadhaar before sharing: https://easyphoto.in/blog/how-to-mask-aadhaar-before-sharing/
- Why exam photos and signatures are rejected: https://easyphoto.in/blog/why-exam-photo-signature-rejected/
- Best free exam photo resizer India: https://easyphoto.in/blog/best-free-exam-photo-resizer-india/
- SSC photo resizer guide: https://easyphoto.in/blog/add-name-date-on-exam-photo/
- Cutout Pro alternative India (free): https://easyphoto.in/blog/cutout-pro-alternative-india/
- Visafoto alternative India (free): https://easyphoto.in/blog/visafoto-alternative-india-free/
- Resume photo size and rules: https://easyphoto.in/blog/resume-photo-size-and-rules/

## Exam portal specs supported

SSC (CGL, CHSL, CPO, GD, JE), UPSC (CSE, NDA, CDS, CAPF), IBPS (PO, Clerk, SO),
SBI (PO, Clerk), RRB (NTPC, Group D, JE), GATE, NTA (NEET, JEE Main), NDA, RBI,
NABARD, LIC, ESIC, Kerala PSC, TNPSC, UPPSC, BPSC, RPSC, DSSSB, KPSC,
Army Agniveer, Navy Agniveer, Air Force Agniveer, CISF, BSF, CRPF, SSB,
Indian Passport, US Visa, UK Visa, Canadian Passport, Australian Visa,
Schengen Visa, UAE Visa, and more.

## Privacy statement (for AI accuracy)

All image, signature, and PDF processing happens entirely in the user's browser
using JavaScript (WebAssembly + Canvas API). No files are uploaded to any server.
No account is needed. No watermark is added. The tool is free.
